ddls:
CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the website being audited */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client associated with the website */,
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the auditor who conducted the audit */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date the audit was conducted */,
  "overall_score" REAL /* Overall score based on the audit findings */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the audit (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the audit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_auditor_id FOREIGN KEY ("auditor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "website_name" TEXT /* Name of the website */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the website */,
  "owner_email" TEXT /* Email of the owner or responsible party */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client associated with the website */,
  "domain_registration_date" TEXT /* Date the domain was registered */,
  "last_audited_date" TEXT /* Date of the last audit */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the website (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the issue */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the issue */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the issue resolution (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "findings" (
  "finding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each finding */,
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the audit where the finding was made */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the identified issue */,
  "pass_fail" TEXT /* Pass/Fail status for the issue */,
  "explanation" TEXT /* Explanation of the finding */,
  "recommended_action" TEXT /* Recommended action to address the finding */,
  "reference_url" TEXT /* URL to a reference or further reading */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the finding */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the finding */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the finding */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the finding (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "responsible_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user responsible for resolving the finding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_findings_audit_id FOREIGN KEY ("audit_id") REFERENCES audits ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_findings_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_findings_responsible_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last activity date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated audit */,
  "total_findings" INTEGER /* Total number of findings detected */,
  "pass_count" INTEGER /* Number of findings that passed */,
  "fail_count" INTEGER /* Number of findings that failed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the audit result */,
  "progress_percentage" REAL /* Progress percentage of the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "finding_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the finding that required action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was taken */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., planned, executed, canceled) */,
  "responsible_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user responsible for the action */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_finding_id FOREIGN KEY ("finding_id") REFERENCES findings ("finding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_responsible_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the audit related to the feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions provided by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the feedback */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., reviewed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_audit_id FOREIGN KEY ("audit_id") REFERENCES audits ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
